name: Dried Cranberry Pilaf
recipeIngredient: 4 cups fresh or canned chicken stock or broth
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add onion and cook until soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Add rice and stir until translucent, 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Add cranberries and stock and stir well.
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until tender, about 18 minutes.
6. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
7. Stir in parsley just before serving.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings
